# subtract runtime

Deployed scripts for ~/.subtract/. These are what install.sh copies.

## Files

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/subtract
  Entry point. Boots tmux with shell + claude + docs side by side.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/handler.sh
  Translation layer. Sources into your shell, intercepts unknown commands,
  routes through T0 (lookup) -> T0.5 (man pages) -> T2 (local model) -> T4 (cloud).

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/ask
  Query local model directly. Claude without the browser.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/lookdown.tsv
  Personal fork lookup table. Seed copy; yours lives at ~/.subtract/lookdown.tsv.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/kiwix
  Query local Kiwix corpus (Wikipedia, Stack Exchange, etc).

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/kiwix-search
  Kiwix search helper.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/cheatsheet.txt
  Quick reference.

## Shell hooks

Source ONE of these in your shell rc file. They load handler.sh and wire up
the command_not_found hook for your shell.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/hooks/bash.sh
  For ~/.bashrc: source ~/.subtract/hooks/bash.sh

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/hooks/zsh.sh
  For ~/.zshrc: source ~/.subtract/hooks/zsh.sh

## Install

These files are deployed by:
  curl -sL subtract.ing/install.sh | bash

Or manually:
  mkdir -p ~/.subtract
  curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/runtime/handler.sh > ~/.subtract/handler.sh
  # ... etc

## Parent

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/03-git/subtract.ing/main/llms.txt
